description.en-US: Milesight AM304L — LoRaWAN (Class A) sensor that monitors temperature, humidity, light / illuminance and occupancy / motion. Uplinks are channel-TLV frames on FPort 85.
description.pt-BR: Milesight AM304L — sensor LoRaWAN (Classe A) que monitora temperatura, umidade, luz / iluminância e presença / movimento. Os uplinks são quadros channel-TLV no FPort 85.
